assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 24: 'Security Configuration was detected as fully populated and not re-prompted'. discovery-log.md line 100: 'exists with all required fields populated and no {{placeholder}} markers' — no prompt or opt-in interaction recorded. The changes-log explicitly confirms idempotency: 'Existing values were preserved without modification' (line 20) and the section was not re-prompted (line 24).
